headlines.title: SpaceX stock falls below $150 debut price, sending market cap under $2 trillion
headlines.summary: Gains have been pared back at the space and AI company following an initial surge after its record-breaking IPO.

headlines.title: Meta announces new smart glasses starting at $299, as Zuckerberg keeps pushing wearables
headlines.summary: Meta executives have said they see the lightweight smart glasses as a step towards a more advanced device that includes screens in the lenses.

headlines.title: U.S. issues sweeping Iran oil sanctions waivers, unlocking billions in revenue for Tehran
headlines.summary: The U.S. issued a sweeping rollback of sanctions on Iranian oil, offering Tehran an economic lifeline as negotiations toward a peace deal proceed.

headlines.title: Oracle sheds 21,000 roles over the past year amid wave of AI layoffs from tech giants
headlines.summary: "The adoption and deployment of AI technologies across our operations have resulted, and may continue to result, in reductions to our workforce," Oracle said.

headlines.title: Sens. Warren, Kelly press Trump administration on effects of tariffs on manufacturing
headlines.summary: A pair of Democratic senators is asking for answers from the Trump administration on the effect of tariffs on U.S. manufacturing.

headlines.title: 'I like their money': Trump threatens lawsuits against ABC for reporting on Reflecting Pool
headlines.summary: The latest action against ABC comes as the broadcaster faces two investigations from the Federal Communications Commission.

headlines.title: Nvidia's stock struggles as Kalshi traders bet chip prices are coming down
headlines.summary: Shares of Nvidia have been faltering recently — and Kalshi traders predict that what the company can charge for chips is also declining.

headlines.title: Three key AI stocks to watch this week with traders expecting giant moves
headlines.summary: Micron and Cerebras report this week. Also there's heavy options activity in Super Micro.

headlines.title: How to pick up some quick income using an auto stock hitting its stride
headlines.summary: With broader macro uncertainties driving pocketed volatility across the automotive sector, patient options traders have an exceptional set-up to harvest high-quality premiums.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts like these 3 dividend stocks for solid returns
The average SpaceX buyer post-IPO is almost under water after two-day slide
headlines.summary: Shares of SpaceX fell as much as 7% Thursday to $178, leaving the stock trading roughly in line with its volume-weighted average price of just under $180.

headlines.title: Kalshi traders see greater than 50% odds the Fed will hike rates this year
headlines.summary: The Federal Reserve suggested higher rates could be in the cards, and traders on Kalshi see growing odds of a hike in 2026.

headlines.title: Investor assumptions about the AI trade are starting to stretch reality, Goldman Sachs says
headlines.summary: Investors may be racing ahead of what the AI trade can deliver, warns Goldman Sachs.

headlines.title: Stock investors expect the Fed to save them. But no ‘Warsh put’ is coming.
headlines.summary: Wall Street’s belief in a central bank safety net misreads the dot-com crash. Alan Greenspan was following rules — not saving portfolios.

headlines.title: My houseguest left heat marks all over my table. I didn’t notice them until she was gone. Do I ask her to pay to remove them?
headlines.summary: “What drives me crazy is that she didn’t mention it.”

headlines.title: Everyday investors fueled the SpaceX trading frenzy. Now they face a bear market.
headlines.summary: From six-figure retirement gambles to tactical day trades, retail investors have made big bets on SpaceX’s volatile stock.

headlines.title: I’m 70. A relative offered me a $25,000 home loan secured by a lien that must be repaid within a year. Is that fair?
headlines.summary: “He also wants me to downsize and move.”

headlines.title: SpaceX sheds $400 billion in value as stock slides below its IPO-day closing price
headlines.summary: Anyone who bought SpaceX’s stock after the first trading day is now underwater on those purchases — at least on paper.
